rationale: Both papers are method papers on scanner-panel multinomial logit choice with overlapping focal constructs (unobserved heterogeneity, state dependence, panel-data brand choice). The cited 2000 paper’s core finding on parameter bias from misspecified heterogeneity/state dependence directly matches the citing 2004 paper’s stated gap and motivation to augment latent class heterogeneity, so this looks plausibly substantive rather than incidental.
